exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.instructions: Bar on upper traps, feet shoulder-width. Brace and sit down until thighs pass parallel. Drive up through mid-foot keeping chest tall.

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.instructions: Rack the bar on front delts with elbows high. Squat deep keeping torso upright. Stand without letting elbows drop.

exercises.name: Box Squat
exercises.instructions: Sit back onto the box under control. Pause briefly without relaxing. Drive up explosively.

exercises.name: Pause Squat
exercises.instructions: Squat to depth and hold for 2-3 seconds. Stay braced during the pause. Stand without bouncing.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Bar over mid-foot, grip just outside legs. Brace, push the floor away, and stand tall. Keep the bar against your legs throughout.

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Wide stance, toes out, grip inside knees. Wedge hips down and drive through the floor. Lock out with glutes.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Start standing, soft knees. Push hips back lowering the bar along your legs. Stop at a deep hamstring stretch and drive hips forward.

exercises.name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Keep legs nearly straight. Hinge at the hips lowering the bar. Feel the stretch, then extend hips to stand.

exercises.name: Rack Pull
exercises.instructions: Set the bar at knee height in a rack. Hinge, grip, and pull to lockout. Squeeze traps at the top.

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Lie on the bench, grip slightly wider than shoulders. Lower the bar to mid-chest with elbows ~45°. Press to lockout keeping shoulder blades pinned.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Grip at shoulder width. Lower to lower chest keeping elbows tucked. Press up focusing on triceps.

exercises.name: Incline Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Set bench to 30-45°. Lower the bar to upper chest. Press up and slightly back.

exercises.name: Decline Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Lie on a decline bench. Lower to lower chest. Press to lockout.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.instructions: Bar at collarbone, elbows slightly forward. Brace glutes and press overhead. Finish with bar over mid-foot, head through.

exercises.name: Push Press
exercises.instructions: Dip slightly at the knees. Drive up with the legs and press overhead. Lock out and control down.

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.instructions: Hinge to ~45°, bar hanging under shoulders. Row to lower ribs. Lower under control without standing up.

exercises.name: Pendlay Row
exercises.instructions: Torso parallel, bar dead on the floor each rep. Row explosively to the sternum. Reset fully between reps.

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.instructions: Straddle the bar with a V-handle. Row to your chest keeping torso angle fixed. Squeeze the back at the top.

exercises.name: Barbell Shrug
exercises.instructions: Hold the bar at arm's length. Shrug shoulders straight up. Pause and lower slowly.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.instructions: Stand tall, grip shoulder width. Curl without swinging the torso. Lower under control.

exercises.name: EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.instructions: Grip the angled handles. Curl keeping elbows pinned to your sides. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Preacher Curl
exercises.instructions: Arms on the preacher pad. Curl up without lifting elbows. Lower until arms are nearly straight.

exercises.name: Skull Crusher
exercises.instructions: Lie back with bar over your face. Bend only at the elbows lowering to the forehead. Extend back to lockout.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.instructions: Upper back on a bench, bar over hips. Drive hips up to full extension. Squeeze glutes hard, then lower.

exercises.name: Good Morning
exercises.instructions: Bar on upper back. Hinge at the hips with soft knees until torso nears parallel. Return by driving hips forward.

exercises.name: Barbell Lunge
exercises.instructions: Bar on back, step forward. Lower until the rear knee nearly touches. Push back to standing.

exercises.name: Barbell Calf Raise
exercises.instructions: Bar on back, balls of feet on a plate. Rise to full extension. Lower for a deep stretch.

exercises.name: Landmine Press
exercises.instructions: Hold the landmine end at your shoulder. Press up and forward. Control the return.

exercises.name: Landmine Row
exercises.instructions: Straddle the bar, hinge, and grip near the sleeve. Row to your hip. Lower under control.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Press dumbbells from chest level to lockout. Keep wrists stacked over elbows. Lower with control to a deep stretch.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.instructions: Bench at 30-45°. Press dumbbells up and slightly together. Lower to upper-chest level.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Fly
exercises.instructions: Slight elbow bend, open arms wide until you feel a chest stretch. Bring the dumbbells together in an arc. Don't turn it into a press.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Fly
exercises.instructions: On an incline bench, open arms in a wide arc. Stretch, then squeeze the dumbbells together above the upper chest.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.instructions: Start at ear level, palms forward. Press overhead until arms lock. Lower under control.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.instructions: Start palms facing you at chin height. Rotate out while pressing overhead. Reverse on the way down.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.instructions: Slight elbow bend. Raise arms out to shoulder height leading with the elbows. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Front Raise
exercises.instructions: Raise the dumbbell straight in front to shoulder height. Keep the torso still. Lower under control.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly
exercises.instructions: Hinge forward, arms hanging. Raise arms out wide squeezing the rear delts. Avoid swinging.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row
exercises.instructions: One hand and knee on a bench. Row the dumbbell to your hip. Lower for a full lat stretch.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Row
exercises.instructions: Lie chest-down on an incline bench. Row both dumbbells to your ribs. Squeeze shoulder blades together.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.instructions: Lie across a bench holding one dumbbell over your chest. Lower it behind your head with slightly bent arms. Pull back over the chest.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curl
exercises.instructions: Curl with palms up, elbows pinned. Squeeze at the top. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.instructions: Neutral grip, palms facing in. Curl without swinging. Lower under control.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.instructions: Sit back on an incline bench, arms hanging. Curl from a full stretch. Keep shoulders back.

exercises.name: Concentration Curl
exercises.instructions: Seated, elbow braced on inner thigh. Curl to the shoulder. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.instructions: Hold one dumbbell overhead with both hands. Lower behind your head bending only the elbows. Extend to lockout.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Kickback
exercises.instructions: Hinge forward, upper arm parallel to floor. Extend the elbow fully. Pause, then return.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.instructions: Hold a dumbbell at your chest. Squat deep between your knees. Drive up keeping the chest tall.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lunge
exercises.instructions: Dumbbells at sides, step forward. Lower the rear knee toward the floor. Push back to standing.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.instructions: Step into a lunge and keep moving forward. Alternate legs each step. Stay tall throughout.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.instructions: Rear foot on a bench, dumbbells at sides. Lower straight down until the front thigh is parallel. Drive through the front heel.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Step-Up
exercises.instructions: Step onto a box driving through the top leg. Stand fully. Lower under control.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Dumbbells in front of thighs. Push hips back keeping them close to your legs. Stand by driving hips forward.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrug
exercises.instructions: Dumbbells at sides. Shrug straight up and pause. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Calf Raise
exercises.instructions: Hold dumbbells, balls of feet elevated. Rise to full extension, pause, and lower deep.

exercises.name: Wrist Curl
exercises.instructions: Forearms on a bench, palms up. Curl the weight with your wrists only. Lower for a full stretch.

exercises.name: Reverse Wrist Curl
exercises.instructions: Forearms on a bench, palms down. Extend the wrists upward. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Farmer's Carry
exercises.instructions: Hold heavy dumbbells at your sides. Walk tall with tight core. Don't let the shoulders slump.

exercises.name: Renegade Row
exercises.instructions: Plank on dumbbells. Row one dumbbell to your hip without twisting. Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.instructions: Feet shoulder-width on the platform. Lower until knees reach ~90°. Press without locking knees hard.

exercises.name: Hack Squat
exercises.instructions: Shoulders under the pads, feet forward. Squat deep keeping back flat on the pad. Drive up through mid-foot.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.instructions: Ankles behind the pad. Extend to full lockout. Lower slowly without letting the stack slam.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.instructions: Lie face down, pad at the ankles. Curl heels to glutes. Lower under control.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.instructions: Pad on lower calves, thighs locked. Curl down and back. Return slowly.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.instructions: Handles at mid-chest height. Press to lockout. Return until a slight chest stretch.

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.instructions: Handles at ear height. Press overhead. Lower with control.

exercises.name: Pec Deck
exercises.instructions: Forearms or hands on the pads. Squeeze the pads together in front of your chest. Open slowly to a stretch.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.instructions: Face the machine, arms forward. Open arms out and back. Pause, then return slowly.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.instructions: Grip wider than shoulders. Pull the bar to your upper chest with elbows down. Control the stretch on the way up.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Pulldown
exercises.instructions: Use a neutral V-handle. Pull to the top of the chest. Let the lats stretch fully at the top.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.instructions: Sit tall, pull the handle to your stomach. Squeeze shoulder blades. Return letting the lats stretch.

exercises.name: Machine Row
exercises.instructions: Chest on the pad. Row the handles back squeezing your shoulder blades. Return slowly.

exercises.name: Assisted Pull-Up Machine
exercises.instructions: Kneel on the assist pad. Pull your chin over the bar. Lower to a full hang.

exercises.name: Assisted Dip Machine
exercises.instructions: Kneel on the assist pad, grip the handles. Lower until upper arms are parallel. Press back to lockout.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Squat
exercises.instructions: Feet slightly forward of the bar. Squat to parallel. Drive up along the fixed path.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Set the bench under the bar path. Lower to mid-chest. Press to lockout.

exercises.name: Machine Preacher Curl
exercises.instructions: Arms on the pad, grip the handles. Curl to full contraction. Lower until arms are nearly straight.

exercises.name: Machine Triceps Extension
exercises.instructions: Elbows on the pad. Extend to lockout. Return under control.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.instructions: Pads on knees, balls of feet on the platform. Rise up, pause, and lower for a deep stretch.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.instructions: Shoulders under the pads. Rise to full extension. Lower slowly below the platform edge.

exercises.name: Hip Abduction Machine
exercises.instructions: Sit with pads outside the knees. Push knees apart. Return slowly.

exercises.name: Hip Adduction Machine
exercises.instructions: Pads inside the knees. Squeeze knees together. Return under control.

exercises.name: Back Extension
exercises.instructions: Hips on the pad, ankles locked. Lower your torso, then extend to neutral. Squeeze glutes at the top; add a plate to progress.

exercises.name: Machine Crunch
exercises.instructions: Grip the handles, elbows on pads. Crunch down rounding the spine. Return slowly.

exercises.name: Glute Kickback Machine
exercises.instructions: Foot on the platform, drive back and up. Squeeze the glute at full extension. Return under control.

exercises.name: Cable Crossover
exercises.instructions: Set pulleys high. Bring the handles together in a downward arc. Squeeze the chest, then open slowly.

exercises.name: Low Cable Fly
exercises.instructions: Pulleys at the bottom. Sweep the handles up and together to shoulder height. Control the return.

exercises.name: Triceps Pushdown
exercises.instructions: Elbows pinned at your sides. Push the bar down to lockout. Let it rise only to elbow height.

exercises.name: Rope Pushdown
exercises.instructions: Grip the rope, elbows pinned. Push down and split the rope ends at the bottom. Return slowly.

exercises.name: Overhead Cable Extension
exercises.instructions: Face away from the machine, rope overhead. Extend the elbows forward to lockout. Stretch on the return.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.instructions: Low pulley, bar or rope. Curl with elbows pinned. Lower under constant tension.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.instructions: Stand side-on to a low pulley. Raise the handle out to shoulder height. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.instructions: Rope at face height. Pull toward your forehead spreading the rope ends. Finish with upper arms in line with shoulders.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.instructions: Pull the handle to your torso keeping chest up. Squeeze the back. Return with control.

exercises.name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
exercises.instructions: Arms nearly straight, bar at shoulder height. Sweep the bar down to your thighs. Feel the lats the whole way.

exercises.name: Cable Pull-Through
exercises.instructions: Face away straddling the rope. Hinge letting the rope pull through. Snap hips forward and squeeze glutes.

exercises.name: Cable Woodchop
exercises.instructions: Pulley high, arms extended. Rotate and pull diagonally across your body. Control the return.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.instructions: Kneel below a high pulley holding the rope by your head. Crunch down rounding the spine. Return slowly.

exercises.name: Cable Kickback
exercises.instructions: Ankle cuff on a low pulley. Kick the leg straight back. Squeeze and return under control.

exercises.name: Cable Upright Row
exercises.instructions: Pull the bar up along your body to chest height. Lead with the elbows. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Cable Shrug
exercises.instructions: Low pulley, bar at arm's length. Shrug straight up. Pause and lower.

exercises.name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
exercises.instructions: Cross the cables at chest height. Open arms wide and back. Return slowly.

exercises.name: Push-Up
exercises.instructions: Hands under shoulders, body in one line. Lower chest to the floor. Press back up without sagging hips.

exercises.name: Wide Push-Up
exercises.instructions: Hands wider than shoulders. Lower with elbows flaring slightly. Press back to lockout.

exercises.name: Diamond Push-Up
exercises.instructions: Hands together under your chest. Lower keeping elbows tucked. Press up through the triceps.

exercises.name: Decline Push-Up
exercises.instructions: Feet elevated on a bench. Lower your chest to the floor. Press back up under control.

exercises.name: Pike Push-Up
exercises.instructions: Hips high in a pike position. Lower the top of your head toward the floor. Press back up.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.instructions: Dead hang, grip wider than shoulders. Pull chin over the bar driving elbows down. Lower to a full hang.

exercises.name: Chin-Up
exercises.instructions: Underhand grip at shoulder width. Pull chin over the bar. Lower fully between reps.

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Pull-Up
exercises.instructions: Palms facing each other. Pull chin over the handles. Control the descent.

exercises.name: Dip
exercises.instructions: Support on parallel bars. Lower until upper arms are parallel. Press back to lockout.

exercises.name: Bench Dip
exercises.instructions: Hands on a bench behind you. Lower your hips bending the elbows to 90°. Press back up.

exercises.name: Inverted Row
exercises.instructions: Hang under a bar, body straight. Pull your chest to the bar. Lower under control.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
exercises.instructions: Feet shoulder-width. Squat until thighs pass parallel. Stand driving through mid-foot.

exercises.name: Pistol Squat
exercises.instructions: Stand on one leg, other leg forward. Squat all the way down on the working leg. Drive back up without touching down.

exercises.name: Split Squat
exercises.instructions: Long stance, torso tall. Lower the rear knee toward the floor. Press through the front heel.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.instructions: Lie on your back, knees bent. Drive hips up squeezing glutes. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.instructions: One foot planted, other leg extended. Drive hips up on the planted leg. Keep hips level.

exercises.name: Nordic Curl
exercises.instructions: Kneel with ankles anchored. Lower your torso forward as slowly as possible. Catch yourself and push back up.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.instructions: Forearms down, body in one line. Brace your core and glutes. Hold without letting hips sag.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.instructions: Stack feet, forearm under shoulder. Lift hips into one straight line. Hold and breathe.

exercises.name: Hollow Hold
exercises.instructions: Lie back, press lower back into the floor. Lift shoulders and legs. Hold the dish shape.

exercises.name: Dead Hang
exercises.instructions: Hang from the bar with straight arms. Keep shoulders active. Hold as long as possible.

exercises.name: Crunch
exercises.instructions: Knees bent, hands by your head. Curl shoulders off the floor. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Sit-Up
exercises.instructions: Anchor your feet if needed. Sit all the way up. Lower with control.

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
exercises.instructions: Alternate elbow to opposite knee. Extend the free leg each rep. Keep the pace controlled.

exercises.name: Russian Twist
exercises.instructions: Sit back with feet up. Rotate your torso side to side. Add weight to progress.

exercises.name: Leg Raise
exercises.instructions: Lie flat, legs straight. Raise legs to vertical. Lower without arching the lower back.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.instructions: Hang from a bar. Raise knees to your chest. Lower without swinging.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.instructions: Hang from a bar, legs straight. Raise feet to bar height. Lower under control.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.instructions: Kneel holding the wheel. Roll forward keeping the core braced. Pull back using your abs.

exercises.name: Mountain Climber
exercises.instructions: From a plank, drive knees to chest alternately. Keep hips low. Move fast but controlled.

exercises.name: Burpee
exercises.instructions: Squat down, kick to a plank, push-up. Jump feet back in. Explode up with a jump.

exercises.name: Box Jump
exercises.instructions: Stand facing the box. Jump landing softly with full foot. Step down between reps.

exercises.name: Jump Squat
exercises.instructions: Squat to parallel. Explode up into a jump. Land soft and reset.

exercises.name: Superman
exercises.instructions: Lie face down, arms extended. Lift arms, chest, and legs together. Pause, then lower.

exercises.name: Bird Dog
exercises.instructions: On all fours, extend opposite arm and leg. Hold briefly without twisting. Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Calf Raise
exercises.instructions: Balls of feet on an edge. Rise to full extension. Lower into a deep stretch.

exercises.name: Wall Sit
exercises.instructions: Back flat on the wall, thighs parallel. Hold the position. Keep weight through the heels.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.instructions: Hinge and hike the bell back. Snap hips forward swinging to chest height. Let the hips do the work, not the arms.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
exercises.instructions: Hold the bell at your chest. Squat deep with elbows inside knees. Drive up tall.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Clean
exercises.instructions: Hike the bell back, then pull it to the rack position. Keep it close to the body. Absorb softly at the shoulder.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Snatch
exercises.instructions: Swing the bell back, then pull it overhead in one motion. Punch through at the top. Lower with control.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Press
exercises.instructions: From the rack position, brace and press overhead. Lock out with the bell over your shoulder. Lower to the rack.

exercises.name: Turkish Get-Up
exercises.instructions: Bell locked out overhead, rise from lying to standing in stages. Keep eyes on the bell. Reverse the steps back down.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Row
exercises.instructions: Hinge with a flat back. Row the bell to your hip. Lower with control.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Bell between your feet. Hinge, grip, and stand tall. Keep the back flat throughout.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.instructions: Hold a band at shoulder height. Pull it apart until it touches your chest. Return slowly.

exercises.name: Band Face Pull
exercises.instructions: Anchor the band at face height. Pull toward your forehead, elbows high. Control the return.

exercises.name: Band Curl
exercises.instructions: Stand on the band. Curl the handles keeping elbows pinned. Lower slowly against the tension.

exercises.name: Banded Lateral Walk
exercises.instructions: Band around knees or ankles, quarter squat. Step sideways keeping tension. Don't let the knees cave.

exercises.name: Band Overhead Press
exercises.instructions: Stand on the band at shoulder width. Press the handles overhead. Lower with control.

exercises.name: Treadmill Run
exercises.instructions: Set a comfortable pace. Run tall with relaxed shoulders. Cool down with a walk.

exercises.name: Outdoor Run
exercises.instructions: Start easy and settle into rhythm. Keep cadence quick and posture tall.

exercises.name: Rowing Machine
exercises.instructions: Drive with the legs, then swing back, then pull. Reverse the order on the return. Keep strokes long and smooth.

exercises.name: Stationary Bike
exercises.instructions: Adjust the seat to a slight knee bend at the bottom. Pedal at a steady cadence.

exercises.name: Stair Climber
exercises.instructions: Step at a steady rhythm without leaning on the rails. Keep a full foot on each step.

exercises.name: Elliptical
exercises.instructions: Drive through both the pedals and handles. Keep an upright posture.

exercises.name: Jump Rope
exercises.instructions: Jump just high enough to clear the rope. Spin from the wrists. Stay light on the balls of your feet.

exercises.name: Incline Walk
exercises.instructions: Set a steep incline at walking pace. Don't hold the rails. Keep strides natural.

exercises.name: Assault Bike
exercises.instructions: Push and pull the handles while pedaling. Pace yourself in intervals.

exercises.name: Swimming
exercises.instructions: Swim at a sustainable pace. Focus on long strokes and steady breathing.
